Description: Get all activities — plain list with no fee data
Get activities + fees for Group Coaching — registered society mandatory — pass society category A+ or A or B
Query Params / URL Params: coaching_type: group_coaching | society_category: A+ or A or B

Description: Get activities + fees for Individual Game Coaching — society optional / unregistered — no society_category needed
Get activities + fees for Personal Tutor — grouped by subject and standard
Get activities + fees for School Students — Compulsory Participant Model — 9 month term only — no society_category
Get subjects + fees for Personal Tutor — dedicated shortcut (same as coaching_type=personal_tutor)
Get all products from all vendors — shown on all 3 registration forms (Individual Participant / Individual Game Coaching / School Student) — no login required
Get all products filtered by sports category
Query Params / URL Params: category: Cricket | Football | Volleyball | Karate | Kabaddi | etc.

Description: Add a new product to vendor's listing — supports image upload via Cloudinary
Request Body: Form-data: productName (required) | sportsCategory (required) | price (required) | sellingPrice (required) | stock (required) | description (optional) | productImage (optional — file)

Description: Get all products listed by the logged-in vendor only
Get a single product by ID — only returns product if it belongs to the logged-in vendor
Update a product — all fields optional — only send fields that changed — supports image re-upload
Request Body: Form-data (all optional): productName | sportsCategory | price | sellingPrice | stock | description | productImage (file)

Description: Delete a product — only allowed if product belongs to the logged-in vendor
